content: Current explorations of LLM self-reflection mechanisms can address a key unstated limitation of the vanilla Self-Refine framework: its reliance on a single, homogeneous feedback perspective. By integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research into Self-Refine's iterative loop, we can create a more robust self-improvement framework that avoids local optimum traps caused by uniform self-feedback.
